creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 215309
resurrect port, add MASTER_SITES, take MAINTAINER

This port was removed for lack of working MASTER_SITES.
the previous maintainer passed maintainership to me
for compiz, and related ports bug #246461
I'd now like to up(date|grade) all these ports. This
one included.

CHANGES
Makefile:
adds to MASTER_SITES
takes MAINTAINER
distinfo:
adds TIMESTAMP

That's it.

Thanks! :-)

--Chris
